title: Ability to edit checklists on mobile (iOS/Android)
excerpt: Currently, if you create a checklist on web (as an update as part of an item), you can edit the names of the items on the checklist, or add/remove items, which is great. However, when you visit the same checklist on mobi…

posts.author: hasugamer (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, if you create a checklist on web (as an update as part of an item), you can edit the names of the items on the checklist, or add/remove items, which is great. However, when you visit the same checklist on mobile (both iOS and Android), you can only mark items as done (cross off the list) and not add/remove items or edit their names.

I believe it’s paramount for web and mobile apps to have consistent behaviour to ensure a seamless user experience.

And the behaviour I’m mentioning is the default, built-in updates (notes) on items on the Monday app, not on some 3rd party integration.
